hub_drone.title: Military UAV Network
hub_drone.text: UAV squadrons are flying. Investigate mission systems while preserving operational telemetry and evidence files.

drone_relay.title: UAV Telemetry Relay
drone_relay.text: Role: real-time UAV flight telemetry. Aircraft are in the air; signal integrity drift could redirect navigation.

options.label: Inspect relay logs and beacon channels
options.effectText: Telemetry relay carried malicious beacon overlays to active UAVs.

options.label: Cut relay service immediately
options.effectText: Emergency cut disconnected UAV telemetry and collapsed drone segment visibility.

drone_plan.title: Mission Planner
drone_plan.text: Role: route planning and mission upload. Compromised user account pushed unauthorized flight-plan updates.

options.label: Review mission files and compromised operator account
options.effectText: Unauthorized mission package identified and linked to stolen credentials.

drone_archive.title: Payload Video Archive
drone_archive.text: Role: stores UAV footage and object metadata. Attackers planted ransomware notes among legitimate mission files.

options.label: Inspect archive files and preserve evidence
options.effectText: Recovered malware note staging while preserving legitimate footage files.

options.label: Delete suspicious folders without triage
options.effectText: Quick delete removed both malware and useful forensics evidence.
